content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — push entitlement (DealAlerts.entitlements) paired with hourly repeating promotional pushes (NotificationScheduler.swift:9-13, `repeats: true`, 3600s) and spam-style metadata ("EVERY HOUR", "unlimited notifications" in description.txt:3) may trigger review questions.
Pierre: Apple's 4.5.4 bars push notifications used for advertising or promotions without user consent, and unsolicited hourly marketing blasts are a classic rejection trigger. Here both the code and the store description promise automatic hourly promotional alerts ("unlimited notifications, all day long") that aren't user-initiated. Consider making these opt-in, respecting user-chosen frequency, and toning down the "every hour / unlimited" spam-style copy.
